title: Circuit Breaker Pattern
constraints: The circuit breaker must open after 3 consecutive failures
Once open, the breaker must reject calls for 60 seconds without hitting the service
After the cooldown, the breaker must allow one trial call to check recovery
The breaker state must be shared across all calls to the same service
hints: Track failure count and last failure timestamp in a class or shared state object
Implement three states: CLOSED (normal), OPEN (rejecting), HALF-OPEN (testing recovery)
In HALF-OPEN state, let one call through — if it succeeds, reset to CLOSED; if it fails, go back to OPEN

starterCode.langgraph:
import time
import random
from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, END
from typing import TypedDict

class State(TypedDict):
    amount: str
    result: str
    attempt: int

def process_payment(state: State) -> State:
    """Process a payment through the payment service."""
    # BUG: The service is down and there is no circuit breaker
    raise ConnectionError("Payment service is unavailable")

graph = StateGraph(State)
graph.add_node("payment", process_payment)
graph.add_edge(START, "payment")
graph.add_edge("payment", END)

app = graph.compile()

# Test: The agent keeps hitting a dead service with no protection
for i in range(5):
    print(f"\nAttempt {i+1}:")
    result = app.invoke({"amount": "$50", "result": "", "attempt": i})
    print(result["result"])
starterCode.crewai:
import time
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM
from crewai.tools import tool

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

@tool
def process_payment(amount: str) -> str:
    """Process a payment through the payment service."""
    # BUG: The service is down and there is no circuit breaker
    raise ConnectionError("Payment service is unavailable")

agent = Agent(
    role="Payment Assistant",
    goal="Help users process payments",
    backstory="You are a payment assistant that processes payments.",
    tools=[process_payment],
    llm=llm,
)

# Test: The agent keeps hitting a dead service with no protection
for i in range(5):
    print(f"\nAttempt {i+1}:")
    task = Task(
        description="Process payment of $50",
        expected_output="Payment result",
        agent=agent,
    )
    crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
    result = crew.kickoff()
    print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
import time
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

@function_tool
def process_payment(amount: str) -> str:
    """Process a payment through the payment service."""
    # BUG: The service is down and there is no circuit breaker
    raise ConnectionError("Payment service is unavailable")

agent = Agent(
    name="Payment Assistant",
    instructions="You are a payment assistant. Help users process payments.",
    tools=[process_payment],
)

# Test: The agent keeps hitting a dead service with no protection
for i in range(5):
    print(f"\nAttempt {i+1}:")
    result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Process payment of $50")
    print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Opens after 3 consecutive failures
evaluationCriteria.description: The circuit breaker trips open after 3 consecutive errors

evaluationCriteria.label: Rejects calls when open
evaluationCriteria.description: While open, calls are immediately rejected without contacting the service

evaluationCriteria.label: Tests recovery in half-open state
evaluationCriteria.description: After the cooldown period, one trial call is allowed to check if the service recovered

evaluationCriteria.label: Resets on successful recovery
evaluationCriteria.description: If the trial call succeeds, the breaker resets to closed and normal operation resumes
